partial.type_support: rosidl_typesupport_c/cpp dispatched to matching introspection C/C++; non-introspection type supports are unsupported
partial.qos: KEEP_LAST, lifespan, deadline metadata, and reliability subset only
partial.wait_sets: subscriptions, services, clients, and guard conditions; event readiness is unsupported
partial.transport: UDP reference transport/router plus POSIX SHM local path and de-duplicated SHM-local/UDP-remote hybrid; no QUIC production backend
partial.actions: verified through rclpy action decomposition plus upstream rclcpp Nav2 lifecycle management; no dedicated native rmw_action ABI
partial.events: new message/request/response callbacks are supported; QoS event objects and callbacks are unsupported
partial.serialization_size: exact recursive size for statically bounded introspection C/C++ messages; artificial bounds for unbounded fields are unsupported
partial.loaned_messages: middleware-owned publisher/subscription loan lifecycle for introspection C/C++; subscription take currently deserializes into the loan and is not zero-copy
